dialogos.texto_en: (Was this the meeting place?\n I'm pretty sure it was here?)
Sorry for keeping you waiting, Uesugi-kun.
Nah, I just got here too.
I'm sorry for dragging you around\nwhile you're back home.
No need to apologize.\nIt's only natural for me to spend time helping you out.
Besides, if I study at home,\nRaiha always complains.
Wait, are you saying that you were\nworking on school assignments\nwhile you were at your parent's home?
I always say that a student's job is studying,\nand that doesn't change,\neven when you're a university student.
Teehee! You're still the same as always.
But, studying isn't the only thing\nthat's important in life.
Huh?
Right now, the time I spend with you\nis more important.
R-really? Thank you...so much.
So, what are we going to do now?
What do you mean...now? Um, well...
We're gonna go announce it, right?\nDo you need to go somewhere else first?
No, I don't! We'll head straight there.
Shall we go, then?
(...This is the second time I've come here, huh.\n I remember standing here with Itsuki\n during that time, too.)
Mother, I know I'm late in telling you.\nBut, I was able to enter the university\nI was aiming for.
I've only just taken the first step towards my dream\nof becoming a teacher...but I'll do my best\nto become a teacher like you, Mother.
So please, watch over me.
(Come to think of it, Itsuki told me about her dream\n of becoming a teacher here, too.)
I couldn't have made it this far\nwithout Uesugi-kun's help.
What? Why are you suddenly saying that?\nIt's weird.
Mom, this is the blunt and tactless guy\nI'm currently dating, Uesugi Futaro-san.
He's a little awkward and lacks delicacy,\nbut don't worry.
I've made sure he's the right person for me.
...I should probably introduce myself too.
Yes.\nI'm sure Mother will be happy too.
Mom%p-2;――
You have no reason to call her, 'Mom.' Not yet.
...How else should I refer to her?
That's true. Well then,\nlet's consider this time as a special occasion.
(...So it's a 'not yet,' huh?)
Now, let me try again.
Mom, I apologize for the late introduction.\nI am Uesugi Futaro,\nthe person currently dating your daughter.
I'm still just a humble university student%p-2;――
But I promise that I will make Itsuki happy!
Wha?!
So, please watch over Itsuki and I\nas we continue on our path!
W-why are you suddenly%p-2;――
What's wrong?\nI just announced my determination to your mom.
Even if you're going to report it,\nthere's no need to shout like that...
I made up my mind and said it.\nIt would be troublesome if she didn't hear it, you know.
Oh, come on...
Hey, there's no need to rush like that.
Who do you think is at fault here?\nIt's because you're being rude!
For sure, it wasn't a good idea to raise my voice\nin the cemetery. I regret it now.
You should!\nJust thinking about how much it echoed around...
When you put it that way,\nI'm starting to feel a bit embarrassed too.
NOW, you start to feel so?\nIf you think so, then please be careful from now on.
Although there were some...issues,\nI'm glad I could announce various things to Mother.
Today's announcement had a special meaning for you, right?
Which one are you talking about?
Huh?\nI mean, the university acceptance...
To me, both are important.
Ah...
Your announcement is important too.\nI think Mother would be happy about it.
...If that's the case, I'm happy too.
Uesugi-kun.\nPlease continue to take care of me.
Y-yeah, of course. Likewise.
A-alright! Let's go back to the apartment and study!
You still have some assignments you don't understand,\nright?
That's right.\nI apologize for involving you in studying\nduring your visit home.
I'll say it again, there's no need to apologize.
I'm happy to dedicate time for you, in any form.
I feel the same way.
Any time spent with you is precious to me,\nregardless of the circumstances.
